name: Premium UI refactor for Auth pages (Sign-in/Sign-up) with Liquid Glass style
description: Refactor the sign-in and sign-up screens to use a modern, high-end 'Liquid Glass' design system, enhancing the first impression of the application.

ui_changes: Added dynamic mesh background to PublicLayout
Implemented glassmorphism in AuthPanel with backdrop blur
evidence.verification: Manual verification in browser and pnpm lint:fix
